text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 205 

RDLGY_NUCLR_MDCN_IND_SW 

LABEL: Radiology Nuclear Medicine Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: The switch indicating whether the beneficiary received radiology nuclear medicine services during the 
stay. 

SHORT NAME: NUCLR_SW 

LONG NAME: RDLGY_NUCLR_MDCN_IND_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No nuclear medicine (revenue code not 034x) 
1 = Yes nuclear medicine
